context.projectOverview: Sprint 4 of spec-20260628-medical-analysis: extend the deterministic OFFLINE proactive review pass (sprint 1) with TWO analyzers — (a) detectTestGaps over a CLOSED recommended-cadence table that flags biomarkers overdue for re-testing relative to injected now (unknown biomarkers SKIPPED, no guessed cadence), and (b) detectCrossMarkerPatterns that deterministically OFFERS a 'want me to dig deeper?' Finding (kind=question) for related markers both out of range WITHOUT making any LLM call. runProactiveReview now emits trend + gap + offer findings in one offline pass. A separate `bober medical review --dig-deeper <findingId>` path runs the deeper analysis by DELEGATING to sprint-3 generateRecommendation (no re-implementation).

completedSprints.title: Proactive trend Findings + vault writer + review pass
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/analysis/{finding,finding-writer,trends,review-pass}.ts. runProactiveReview orchestrates analyzeTrends -> writeFinding -> writeDashboard. MedicalFinding + deterministic findingId (SHA-256 domain|biomarker|ruleKey, excludes now). HealthDataStore.listBiomarkers() + getLabSeries. Commit 307e5e7. EXTEND review-pass.ts to also call the new cadence + cross-marker analyzers; reuse finding/finding-writer.

completedSprints.title: Recommendation generation end-to-end + recommend CLI
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/recommend/{context,urgency,recommend}.ts. generateRecommendation(question, opts/deps) — red-flag-first, egress-gated fail-closed lenses, judge-loop, emits action/question Finding + audit. `bober medical recommend` subcommand. Commit 3b2abb9. IMPORT generateRecommendation for the --dig-deeper deep analysis; do NOT re-implement.

notes: Full contract (sc-4-1..sc-4-7, nonGoals, stopConditions, assumptions, estimatedFiles) in .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-4.json. Read the Sprint Briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-4-briefing.md FIRST. CRITICAL: the proactive offer/gap detection makes ZERO LLM/network calls (deterministic, offline) — only the explicit --dig-deeper CLI flag crosses into the gated LLM path via generateRecommendation. Cadence is a CLOSED code-reviewed table (unknown biomarkers skipped, no guessing — mirror the NumericPrimitive closed-whitelist discipline). Cross-marker offers are deterministic (configured related-marker pairs both out of reference range). Dig-deeper maps an offer findingId back to its marker pair via the offer finding's frontmatter. Do NOT modify engine.ts.
